lessons.note: Pure field/knower metaphysics; no universal kernel.
One-knower-in-all-fields abstraction; pure metaphysics.

lessons.text: Let desire and pain pass; they aren't you.
Stay humble, honest, and free of pretense.
Harm no one; forgive; keep yourself in check.
Stay humble enough to keep learning.
lessons.note: Reframed 'serve your teacher' as lifelong learning.

lessons.text: Loosen your grip on pleasure and ego.
Face aging, sickness, and death clearly.
Don't tie your identity to family or home.
Stay even whether outcomes please or disappoint.
Make room for solitude to hear yourself.
lessons.note: Dropped 'devotion'; kept the value of solitude.

lessons.text: Keep coming back to knowing yourself.

lessons.note: The eternal/Brahman; pure metaphysics.

lessons.text: Support everything; cling to nothing.

lessons.note: The one presence within/beyond all beings; metaphysics.
Light-of-lights in every heart; metaphysics.
Nature as cause of action; abstract metaphysics.

lessons.text: What you cling to shapes who you become.
lessons.note: Dropped rebirth; kept attachment-shapes-you kernel.

lessons.text: Watch your reactions without meddling in them.

lessons.note: Spirit/matter and ending rebirth; metaphysics.

lessons.text: Grow through reflection, learning, or action.
lessons.note: Reframed the three paths as ways to grow.
Crossing beyond death by faithful hearing; religious metaphysics.
Field-and-knower union; metaphysics.
Imperishable within the perishable; metaphysics.

lessons.text: Harm others and you harm yourself.

lessons.note: Nature acts, Self stays still; metaphysics (dup of 250).
All beings resting in the One; metaphysics.
The Self neither acts nor is tainted; metaphysics.

lessons.text: Touch everything; let nothing stain you.

lessons.note: One awareness illumining the field; metaphysics.
Distinguishing field from knower; metaphysics.

lessons.text: Clear understanding sets you free.

lessons.note: Beings from one divine source; metaphysics.

lessons.text: Three forces drive you: clarity, craving, inertia.
lessons.note: Gunas reframed in plain terms.

lessons.text: Even clarity and joy can quietly trap you.
Craving chains you to restless action.
Catch the dullness pulling you toward neglect.
Notice which force is driving you right now.
When insight sharpens, clarity is leading you.
When greed and restlessness surge, craving is driving you.
When fog and laziness settle, inertia has taken hold.
The mood that rules you shapes where you end up.
lessons.note: Dropped rebirth; kept dominant-force-shapes-destiny kernel.

lessons.text: Every act bears fruit: clarity, pain, or dullness.
Your ruling mood lifts, holds, or sinks you.
See the forces at work, then rise above them.
Stay steady whether moods rise or fade.
Steady commitment carries you beyond your moods.
lessons.note: Dropped 'devotion'; kept steadiness-transcends-moods kernel.
Deathless ground behind change; metaphysics.

lessons.text: Cut an unhealthy attachment at its root.

lessons.note: Primeval source beyond rebirth; metaphysics.

lessons.text: Rise above pride, delusion, and the pull of opposites.

lessons.note: Self as a fragment of the divine; metaphysics.
Eye of knowledge to see the Self; metaphysics (dup of 245).
One divine light in sun/moon/fire; metaphysics.
Memory/knowledge from the divine within; abstract.
Supreme beyond perishable/imperishable; metaphysics.

lessons.text: Understand what matters and right action follows.
lessons.note: Kept the understanding-orders-action kernel.
